affirmations: You faced your discomfort with courage
Every time you practice, you get stronger

education.title: Psychoeducation
education.subtitle: Learn about anxiety and coping techniques

topics.title: What is anxiety?
topics.content: Anxiety is a natural body response to stressful situations. It is normal to feel anxious occasionally, but when it becomes excessive it can affect your daily life.

topics.title: Breathing Techniques
topics.content: Deep breathing activates the parasympathetic nervous system, helping to reduce the fight-or-flight response and promoting calm.

topics.title: 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding
topics.content: This technique helps you reconnect with the present using your senses: 5 things you see, 4 you touch, 3 you hear, 2 you smell, 1 you taste.
